info.title: Voyager Configuration Tool - CLI for JSON encryption/decryption
info.description:
CLI tool for encrypting and decrypting JSON configuration files compatible with Voyager.Configuration.MountPath library.
      Provides migration helper for transitioning from built-in encryption to SOPS.

      WARNING: Built-in encryption is deprecated. This tool is provided for backward compatibility and migration purposes only.
      For new projects, use Mozilla SOPS instead.
